001package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton;
002
003import com.pathplanner.lib.path.PathPlannerPath;
004// import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeAgitateWhileOuttaking;
005import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetHomingDown;
006// import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIntake;
007import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveResetPose;
008import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
009import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.SequentialCommandGroup;
010import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.WaitCommand;
011
012public class LBFerry extends SequentialCommandGroup {
013
014    public LBFerry(PathPlannerPath... paths) {
015        addCommands(
016                new SwerveResetPose(paths[0].getStartingHolonomicPose().get()), CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance()
017                        .followPathCommand(paths[0]), /* alongWith(new IntakeSetIntake()) */
018                CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance().followPathCommand(paths[1]), new WaitCommand(2), /*
019                                                                                                        * .deadlineFor(
020                                                                                                        * new
021                                                                                                        * IntakeAgitateWhileOuttaking
022                                                                                                        * ().repeatedly(
023                                                                                                        * ))
024                                                                                                        */
025                CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance().followPathCommand(paths[2]).alongWith(new IntakeSetHomingDown()),
026                CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance().followPathCommand(paths[3]));
027    }
028}
